summary: Tested Live Order Tracking feature (تتبع الطلب على الخريطة الحية). All 21 backend API tests PASSED. Frontend components verified: OrderTrackingMap.js and LocationTracker.js have no linting errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Location Update API (POST /api/delivery/location/update) - Works correctly, delivery users only (returns 403 for admin/buyer)
Get Driver Location API (GET /api/delivery/location/{driver_id}) - Works correctly with proper authorization checks
Live Order Tracking API (GET /api/delivery/order-tracking/{order_id}/live) - Returns correct structure with driver info, location, and ETA
Delete Location API (DELETE /api/delivery/location) - Works correctly, delivery users only
Buyer authorization check works - buyers can only view driver location if they have an active order from that driver
Location data validation works - returns 422 for missing latitude/longitude or invalid types
Full lifecycle tested: create -> read -> delete -> verify deleted
seed_data_creation: Created delivery user (0912340001) for testing via registration API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live Location Tracking APIs fully tested and working. Delivery user phone 0912340001 created for testing. Location update/delete APIs are restricted to delivery user_type only. Get driver location requires buyer to have active order from that driver. Order tracking live endpoint returns driver info, location, and estimated time.

location_update_api.details: Updates driver location with latitude, longitude, optional heading and speed. Restricted to delivery users only.

get_driver_location_api.details: Returns driver current location. Admin/seller can view any driver. Buyer can only view driver with active order.

order_tracking_live_api.details: Returns order tracking data with driver info, location, address, and estimated arrival time.

delete_location_api.details: Deletes driver location when ending work shift. Restricted to delivery users only.

authorization_checks.details: All endpoints properly check user_type and ownership. Buyers cannot view driver location without active order.

validation.details: Location update returns 422 for missing required fields (latitude/longitude) and invalid data types.

frontend_components.details: Both components have no linting errors and are properly implemented.
